title: RTX ON TOTEMS
description: Another sequel to the RTX ON but this time with new totems.
body: Another sequel to the RTX ON franchise is here but this time with custom totems, you can enjoy extreme graphics with custom totems, there are more than 20 new totems to obtain, all of them have unique abilities which can help you in many ways, from repairing broken tools to surviving the void. On top of all these new totems there are amazing graphics which will improve your minecraft experience. Mods such as physics and iris shaders are included in the modpack so there is no need to hassle with downloading them. What are you waiting for, go and download this modpack and experience many new totems which are craftable (of course).
